summary_es: Hay evidencia reciente de una ruta operativa, pero persisten restricciones, incidentes o un riesgo marítimo elevado.
summary_en: Recent evidence indicates an operational route, but restrictions, incidents or elevated maritime risk remain.
source_title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz open to commercial traffic - Reuters

summary_es: Existe una declaración de cierre, pero no hay confirmación suficiente de que todo el tráfico marítimo esté detenido.
summary_en: A closure has been declared, but there is not enough confirmation that all maritime traffic has stopped.
source_title: US attacks Iran over ship being hit in Strait of Hormuz; Tehran responds by hitting Arab states - AP News

summary_es: Inicio del nuevo historial con el motor de consenso conservador.
summary_en: New history started with the conservative consensus engine.
